headings.description: Tech-forward, authoritative yet approachable. Extreme contrast in weights (Light for modifiers, Black for keywords).

primary.description: Bright Cyber Yellow. Used strictly for CTAs to create high contrast against dark backgrounds.

background.description: Deepest void black. Not purely #000, slightly tinted for depth.

accent.description: Used sparsely for glowing nodes, map pins, and data visualizations.

spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs to give breathing room. Emphasize emptiness to draw focus to the copy and CTA.

pricing.highlight: relative overflow-hidden before:absolute before:inset-0 before:bg-gradient-to-br before:from-yellow-500/10 before:to-transparent

layout.description: Asymmetry creates tension. Use 12-column grids with varying span widths (e.g., col-span-8 and col-span-4) to prevent boring perfectly symmetrical layouts.

visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise overlay on the entire body to kill digital flatness.
visual_enhancers.glows: Soft, blurred radial gradients behind key elements (like the hero text and CTA) to create a 'Tracing Beam' effect.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Used for sticky header and floating elements. Must include 1px delicate inner stroke to separate from background.

motion.entrance: Staggered fade-up for bento grid items and text. Use Framer Motion.
motion.micro_interactions: Hover lifts on cards, glow intensification on CTA buttons.
motion.parallax: Subtle parallax on background abstract elements.

images.description: Abstract glowing map nodes, used as a subtle, low-opacity background behind the hero section to represent AI and location data.
Joyful business owners. Used in the problem/solution transition to show successful clients.
Portrait of a happy businessman. Used for the HVAC or Plumber testimonial.
Smiling woman wearing a blazer. Used for the Dentist or Lawyer testimonial.
Person holding a tablet. Used to illustrate receiving and viewing the AI Visibility Report.

sections.name: Hero
features: Headline: 'Is AI Stealing Your Local Customers?'
Subheadline: 'In 2026, standard SEO is dead. See exactly how AI Search Engines (ChatGPT, Google SGE) rank your business with the GEO Boost Engine.'
Primary CTA: 'Get My $199 AI Visibility Report'
Social Proof snippet: 'Trusted by 500+ local businesses.'

sections.name: Problem Agitation
features: Statistic: '68% of local searches now happen via AI Assistants.'
Visual: Map with faded out pins (representing invisible businesses).
Pain point: 'If AI doesn't know you, you don't exist.'

sections.name: Value Stack / Pricing
features: List of deliverables: Keyword AI mapping, Sentiment Analysis, Competitor Gap Report

instructions_to_main_agent: Use framer-motion for all scroll and entrance animations.
Ensure the hero CTA is always visible or easily accessible (sticky header).
Use raw HTML and Tailwind for layout structures. Do not use restrictive UI library wrappers for main sections.
Ensure contrast passes APCA standards. Do not put grey text on dark grey backgrounds if it fails contrast.
Add a subtle grain texture (`url('/noise.png')` or SVG filter) to the background to make the dark theme feel premium, not plastic.
universal_guidelines: Do not converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid the 'AI slop' aesthetic.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) where appropriate, always with a subtle border.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., `transition: all`).
You MUST NOT center align the app container in CSS.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped with interaction animations.
NEVER use emoji characters for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute.
Do not use complete `transparent` background in header or overlays. Ensure content under them is readable via blur or solid bg.
